name: InMemoryDataset
description: In-Memory Dataset Node - Create a DataFrame directly from inline data definitions without reading from external files. Ideal for testing, small reference datasets, lookup tables, and quick prototyping workflows.
input: Creates an in-memory DataFrame from user-provided data and schema definitions.
output: Outputs a DataFrame constructed from the provided data string and field definitions.

fields.name: dataType
fields.title: Data Type
fields.description: Select the format of the input data. Use json for structured JSON records or comma_delimited for CSV-style inline data.

fields.name: dataStr
fields.title: Data Str
fields.description: Inline data used to build the DataFrame. Provide valid JSON records or comma-delimited rows based on the selected Data Type. Refer to the Examples tab for supported formats.

fields.name: fieldDefsStr
fields.title: Field Defs Str
fields.description: Define the schema for comma-delimited data using name:type pairs (e.g., id:Integer,name:String,score:Float,signup_date:Date). Required only when Data Type is comma_delimited.

fields.name: outputColNames
fields.title: Column Names for the fieldstr
fields.description: Explicitly specify output column names. Overrides names inferred from the data or field definitions.

fields.name: outputColTypes
fields.title: Column Types for the Delta
fields.description: Define the data types for output columns. Useful when you want strict control over casting and schema consistency.

fields.name: outputColFormats
fields.title: Column Formats for the Delta
fields.description: Optional formatting rules for output columns, such as date or timestamp formats, applied during DataFrame creation.
